Berkan

Here you can see all of my coding projects. For more details on individual projects please visit my GitHub page or the GitHub links listed by each project.


Covid Detection Kaggle

6/2021 - 8/2021

Created a model to view lung X-rays to localize lung opacities and use them to make COVID-19 diagnoses.

GitHub

Dev Fruit

3/2020 - 5/2020

Created fun fruit themed videos of cool projects.

YouTube

Blind Assistant

9/2019 - Present

Creating a headset and program to be used by visually impaired pedestrians.

GitHub

Techno Titans Robotics

8/2017 - 5/2021

Worked on a variety of vision code in Python and robot code in Java.

GitHub

Sleep Apnea AI

10/2018 - 3/2019

Science Fair project called the Early Detection of Sleep Apnea using Machine Learning and Simplified Tests, placed in the top 10% at the Georgia Science Fair.

GitHub

Destination: Titan

1/2019 - 4/2019

App created by a team I lead inside the Techno Titans, high school robotics team, to share STEM in the community

GitHub
Google Play App Store

Mole Project

10/2018

A Robotic Mole Plush Toy that Talks and Takes Voice Commands

GitHub

Space Invaders AI

8/2018

Various Reinfocement Learning Methods used to play Space Invaders

GitHub

SmartLib

6/2018

Library Managing app created for FBLA, Future Business Leaders of America, Nationals 2018

Titan Power Up

1/2018 - 3/2018

App I created as part of the Techno Titans, a high school robotics team, to share STEM
